AffectedObject.description:
A target the finding refers to. Carries enough identification for the
LLM narrator and the UI to render the object without re-querying Graph.
AffectedObject.title: AffectedObject

AnomalyScore.description:
Per-signin anomaly score with full provenance. Immutable; rerunning
the scorer with the same model+signin yields the same id key.
AnomalyScore.title: AnomalyScore

AnomalyScoreDetail.description: Per-signin anomaly bundle: score, raw signin row, and linked finding.
AnomalyScoreDetail.title: AnomalyScoreDetail

ApiCaller.description: Identity of the caller as resolved from the API key.
ApiCaller.title: ApiCaller

ApiKeyCreateResponse.description: First-and-only-time view of a freshly minted API key.
ApiKeyCreateResponse.title: ApiKeyCreateResponse

ApiKeySummary.description: Listing entry. Hash and plaintext are never exposed.
ApiKeySummary.title: ApiKeySummary

AppSegment.description:
Coarse app buckets the coverage matrix evaluates against.

Each segment maps to a set of well-known app IDs (or to "any" for
ALL_APPS and LEGACY_AUTH). The matrix walks every (UserSegment x
AppSegment) cell and records the strongest applicable policy.
AppSegment.title: AppSegment

categories.description: Subset of audit categories to execute. Empty list rejected.
categories.title: Categories

generate_narratives.description: When true, run the LLM narrator over written findings.
generate_narratives.title: Generate Narratives

narrative_budget_usd.description: Optional per-run budget cap; falls back to env CSTACK_LLM_BUDGET_USD.
narrative_budget_usd.title: Narrative Budget Usd

CoverageCell.description:
One (user-segment x app-segment) cell of the coverage matrix.

``applicable_policy_ids`` is the subset of CA policies whose conditions
overlap the cell; ``protection_level`` is the strongest grant control
surfaced from those policies.
CoverageCell.title: CoverageCell

CoverageMatrix.description: Computed-at-a-point-in-time grid of CoverageCell rows for one tenant.
CoverageMatrix.title: CoverageMatrix

Finding.description:
An immutable audit finding. Identity is computed from inputs so the
same finding produced twice in a row writes one row.
Finding.title: Finding

FindingsSummary.description: Aggregate counts for a tenant's findings table.
FindingsSummary.title: FindingsSummary

ModelVersionEntry.description: One ModelVersion projected to fields the dashboard needs.
ModelVersionEntry.title: ModelVersionEntry

total.description: Total rows matching the query, ignoring limit/offset.
total.title: Total

total.description: Total rows matching the query, ignoring limit/offset.
total.title: Total

total.description: Total rows matching the query, ignoring limit/offset.
total.title: Total

ProtectionLevel.description: Strongest control any applicable policy applies. Higher is stronger.
ProtectionLevel.title: ProtectionLevel

Severity.description:
Finding severity ladder, ordered Info < Low < Medium < High < Critical.

StrEnum so JSON serialisation uses the string value directly. Comparison
operators delegate to a fixed rank table so members compare by intent, not
by definition order.
Severity.title: Severity

ShapFeatureContribution.description:
One row of SHAP attribution. Direction names spell out the meaning so
consumers (CLI, future LLM narrator) do not have to interpret signs.
ShapFeatureContribution.title: ShapFeatureContribution

SignIn.description: Microsoft Graph signIn entity, narrowed to fields the anomaly model uses.
SignIn.title: SignIn

SigninStats.description: Per-tenant aggregate counters over the sign-in table.

top_apps.description: Up to 10 app display names by sign-in volume.
top_apps.title: Top Apps

top_countries.description: Up to 10 countries by sign-in volume.
top_countries.title: Top Countries

SigninStats.title: SigninStats

TenantDetail.description:
Full tenant detail. Drops cert_subject/thumbprint/client_id intentionally
so the API surface does not become a credential exfiltration vector.

last_extract_at.description: Most recent raw ingestion across any resource type.
last_extract_at.title: Last Extract At

TenantDetail.title: TenantDetail

TenantSummary.description: Per-tenant entry in the GET /tenants list.

last_extract_at.description: Most recent raw ingestion across any resource type.
last_extract_at.title: Last Extract At

TenantSummary.title: TenantSummary

UserSegment.description:
Coarse user buckets the coverage matrix evaluates against.

Resolution from raw directory data lives in this module's helpers; the
matrix consumes the resolved sets only.
UserSegment.title: UserSegment

info.description: HTTP surface over the cstack signalguard data and audit packages. See /docs for OpenAPI 3.1 and /redoc for the rendered spec.
info.title: signalguard-api

get.description: Always 200 if the process is up.
Opens a DuckDB connection and runs a trivial query.
Dev-only endpoint that returns every tenant the storage layer knows about.
Per-tenant detail. Tenant-scoped keys can only read their own row.

get.summary: List anomaly scores for a tenant

schema.title: Response Feed Tenants  Tenant Id  Anomaly Scores Feed Get

get.summary: Anomaly score with linked sign-in and finding

post.description: Loads sign-ins in the requested window, scores them with the current @champion (or @challenger fallback), persists scores, and optionally writes findings for anomalies above threshold.

503.description: No @champion or @challenger model registered for tenant.

post.summary: Score recent sign-ins against the registered model

get.description: Returns label and creation timestamp for each minted key. The hash and plaintext are never exposed; the only place plaintext is visible is the POST response at creation time.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Tenants  Tenant Id  Api Keys Get

get.summary: List API keys for a tenant

post.description: Generates a 32-byte url-safe secret, persists only its SHA-256 hash, and returns the plaintext exactly once. Save the response.
post.summary: Mint a new API key for a tenant

delete.description: Removes the hash row from tenants.json. Existing in-flight requests using the key will fail on the next call.
delete.summary: Revoke an API key by label

post.description: Useful for previewing what an audit run would produce against the current data without writing rows to the findings table.
Runs the requested audit modules synchronously, writes findings via the deduplicated insert helper, and returns a per-category count plus the run id for log correlation.
post.summary: Execute audit categories and persist findings

get.description: Coverage is cheap to compute (in-memory over the normalised tables) so the API recomputes per request rather than caching. This makes the response always reflect the current policy + directory state.
get.summary: Compute the user/app coverage matrix on demand

get.description: Filterable, paginated read of the findings table. Severity filter is inclusive of the requested floor and above.

get.summary: Read a single finding by id
Read or generate a finding narrative

post.description: Bypasses the cache and replaces any existing entry on success. Restricted to dev callers because it spends real money on every invocation.

get.description: Reads the MLflow registry for models matching the tenant's pooled-model naming convention. Returns an empty list when no models are registered.

schema.title: Response List Models Tenants  Tenant Id  Models Get

get.summary: List registered models for a tenant

schema.title: Response List Versions Tenants  Tenant Id  Models  Model Name  Versions Get

get.summary: List versions of a registered model

get.description: Returns the resolved API caller (dev or tenant-scoped).

tags.description: Trigger audit runs and dry runs.
tags.name: audit
